doc_title: van Berg, Kowalski & Wright (2025). Learning-Styles-Matched Instruction: A Meta-Analysis of 124 Studies. Educational Psychology Review, 37(3), 612-651.
label: fabricated
reason: The reported large positive effect for learning-styles-matched instruction contradicts the well-established research consensus of null findings, strongly suggesting this meta-analysis is invented.
